title: Iranian-flagged tanker detained by Oman authorities for AIS manipulation near Muscat
summary: ShipNews reports Omani maritime authorities detained an Iranian-flagged tanker near Muscat anchorage for suspected AIS manipulation and documentation irregularities linked to sanctions evasion.
contents:
# Iranian Tanker Detained in Oman for AIS Manipulation

## Incident Details
Omani maritime authorities detained an Iranian-flagged tanker near the Muscat anchorage on May 1, 2026, for suspected AIS (Automatic Identification System) manipulation and documentation irregularities.

## Vessel Information
- Flag state: Iran
- Vessel type: crude oil tanker
- Suspected cargo: Iranian crude oil
- AIS status: intermittent transmission detected over preceding 72 hours

## Enforcement Context
The detention aligns with increased regional enforcement activity following the US-declared maritime blockade of Iranian ports. Omani authorities have cooperated with international enforcement efforts while maintaining diplomatic relations with Tehran.

## Implications
The incident demonstrates expanding sanctions enforcement beyond traditional chokepoints to regional anchorages and transit zones. Dark fleet operators face growing risk across the Gulf of Oman and Arabian Sea.

## Tags
iran, sanctions, tanker, oman, ais-manipulation, maritime-enforcement, dark-fleet
